meta.clamped_reason: input_json contains 22 changes, so overall_end_id=050 was clamped to 022

phase2_runtime_tests.blocker: cmake, ninja, and cl are not available in PATH in this environment.

results.change_condition: for payloads sent from the client to the server in the example
results.change_action: must be present only for record layer payloads containing the Finished message or application data
results.input_evidence: only the record layer payloads containing the Finished message or application data include a CID.
results.comment: 该条来自 RFC 示例交换，只说明示例中 client-to-server 方向哪些 payload 带 CID；不是独立实现约束。BoringSSL 未实现 RFC 9146 CID，不能用示例常量判断满足性。
results.comparison_summary: 要求 -> 示例说明；标准含义 -> 解释单向 CID 使用；代码行为 -> 无 connection_id 扩展和 tls12_cid 路径；结论 -> 信息性示例，不列为缺陷。

results.change_condition: if implementation chooses to receive CIDs of different lengths
results.input_evidence: If, however, an implementation chooses to receive CIDs of different lengths, the assigned CID values must be self-delineating
results.comment: 条件是实现选择接收不同长度的 CID。BoringSSL 没有 RFC 9146 CID 接收功能，因此该条件未被触发；缺失的基础 CID 功能在其他条目中记录。
results.comparison_summary: 要求 -> 可变长度 CID 必须可自分界；标准含义 -> 因记录中没有 cid_length，接收方需能确定长度；代码行为 -> 没有 CID 接收路径；结论 -> 条件未触发。

results.change_condition: in the example ServerHello extension
results.input_evidence: ServerHello (connection_id=100)
results.comment: ServerHello(connection_id=100) 是 RFC 示例值，不是固定常量要求。
results.comparison_summary: 要求 -> 示例常量；标准含义 -> 仅演示服务器希望客户端使用的 CID；代码行为 -> 无 ServerHello connection_id 扩展；结论 -> 示例不适合作为实现缺陷。

results.change_condition: in the example exchange, to indicate that a zero-length CID is present in the "connection_id" extension
results.input_evidence: To indicate that a zero-length CID is present in the "connection_id" extension, we use the notation 'connection_id=empty'.
results.comment: ClientHello(connection_id=empty) 是 RFC 示例中的零长度 CID 表示法，不是固定行为要求。
results.comparison_summary: 要求 -> 示例表示法；标准含义 -> 零长度 CID 表示一方向不希望收到 CID；代码行为 -> 无 ClientHello connection_id 扩展；结论 -> 示例不适用。

results.change_condition: once encryption is enabled in the example exchange
results.related_state_or_step: record layer after encryption is enabled
results.input_evidence: In the example exchange, the CID is included in the record layer once encryption is enabled.
results.comment: RFC 9146 要求非零 CID 协商后、加密启用后用 CID-enhanced record format 和 tls12_cid 发送。BoringSSL DTLS 1.2 写路径仍写普通 DTLSPlaintext header，没有 CID 字段或 tls12_cid。
results.comparison_summary: 要求 -> 非零 CID 方向加密后必须带 CID；标准含义 -> Finished 和应用数据等加密记录进入新记录格式；代码行为 -> DTLS 1.2 写出 out[0]=type, version, epoch+seq, length；结论 -> 不满足。

results.change_condition: when the extension has been negotiated
results.change_action: set to the negotiated CID value; length is cid_length bytes
results.input_evidence: cid:  The CID value, cid_length bytes long, as agreed at the time the extension has been negotiated.
results.comment: RFC 9146 的 DTLSCiphertext.cid 字段应等于协商 CID，长度为 cid_length。BoringSSL 没有 negotiation state，也没有在 DTLS 1.2 record header 中解析或写入 CID 字段。
results.comparison_summary: 要求 -> 记录携带协商 CID；标准含义 -> CID 位于 sequence_number 与 length 之间；代码行为 -> parse_dtls12_record 直接读取 length-prefixed body；结论 -> 不满足。

results.change_condition: for all the pre-existing entries in the registry
results.input_evidence: All the pre-existing entries are given the value "N".
results.comment: IANA 对既有注册表条目的 DTLS-Only 列赋值不是库实现行为。
results.comparison_summary: 要求 -> 注册表元数据；标准含义 -> IANA 维护内容；代码行为 -> BoringSSL 不维护 TLS ExtensionType 注册表完整镜像；结论 -> 不适用。

results.change_condition: for the connection_id(54) entry in the TLS ExtensionType Values registry
results.input_evidence: | 54    |connection_id  | CH, | Y         | N           | RFC 9146  |
results.comment: connection_id(54) 的 IANA 注册表项本身不是实现义务；实际扩展协商缺失在 CID 功能条目中记录。
results.comparison_summary: 要求 -> IANA 分配；标准含义 -> codepoint 为 54；代码行为 -> kExtensions 无 connection_id 处理器；结论 -> 注册表条目不适用。

results.change_condition: for the new registry column added to the "TLS ExtensionType Values" registry
results.new_value: "Y" if the extension is only applicable to DTLS, "N" otherwise
results.input_evidence: The valid entries are "Y" if the extension is only applicable to DTLS, "N" otherwise.
results.comment: DTLS-Only 列取值规则属于 IANA 注册表维护，不是 BoringSSL 协议状态机行为。
results.comparison_summary: 要求 -> 注册表列有效值；标准含义 -> IANA 使用 Y/N；代码行为 -> 不相关；结论 -> 不适用。

results.change_condition: after DTLSInnerPlaintext is serialized
results.change_action: set to encrypted form of the serialized DTLSInnerPlaintext
results.input_evidence: enc_content:  The encrypted form of the serialized DTLSInnerPlaintext structure.
results.comment: RFC 9146 要求 enc_content 是序列化 DTLSInnerPlaintext 的加密结果。BoringSSL 仅在 DTLS 1.3 路径附加内部 content type；DTLS 1.2 CID 路径不存在。
results.comparison_summary: 要求 -> 先构造 DTLSInnerPlaintext 再加密；标准含义 -> real_type 与 zero padding 进入加密包络；代码行为 -> DTLS 1.2 SealScatter 直接加密输入 payload；结论 -> 不满足。

results.change_condition: when determining whether a received datagram can trigger a peer address change
results.change_action: must be newer than the newest datagram received
results.old_value: epoch of the newest datagram received
results.new_value: a greater/newer epoch in the received datagram
results.input_evidence: The received datagram is "newer" (in terms of both epoch and sequence number) than the newest datagram received.
results.comment: RFC 9146 对 CID 记录源地址变化要求验证后且 epoch/sequence 更新。BoringSSL 有 replay bitmap，但没有 CID 到连接查找和 peer address update 状态机，因此没有该地址更新门控。
results.comparison_summary: 要求 -> CID 记录可触发受限 peer address update；标准含义 -> 必须同时满足认证、新 epoch/sequence、地址可达策略；代码行为 -> 只做记录重放窗口，不处理 CID 源地址迁移；结论 -> 不满足。

results.change_condition: validation
results.input_evidence: The length MUST NOT exceed 2^14.
results.comment: BoringSSL 对普通/DTLS 1.3 plaintext 有 SSL3_RT_MAX_PLAIN_LENGTH 限制，但没有 RFC 9146 length_of_DTLSInnerPlaintext 字段和 CID-specific 检查。
results.comparison_summary: 要求 -> serialized DTLSInnerPlaintext 长度不得超过 2^14；标准含义 -> CID 记录的内部明文长度参与 MAC/AAD；代码行为 -> generic plaintext limit 存在，CID-specific field 不存在；结论 -> 部分满足。
results.category: generic limit only, no CID-specific field

results.change_condition: when DTLSInnerPlaintext is serialized
results.change_action: set to the length in bytes of the serialized DTLSInnerPlaintext
results.input_evidence: length_of_DTLSInnerPlaintext:  The length (in bytes) of the serialized DTLSInnerPlaintext (two-byte integer).
results.comment: RFC 9146 要求 length_of_DTLSInnerPlaintext 是序列化 DTLSInnerPlaintext 的两字节长度。BoringSSL DTLS 1.2 记录长度表示 ciphertext/body 长度，没有 CID 内部明文长度字段。
results.comparison_summary: 要求 -> CID MAC/AAD 使用内部明文长度；标准含义 -> 与 DTLSCiphertext.length 区分；代码行为 -> parse/write 只使用标准 DTLS length；结论 -> 不满足。

results.change_condition: MAC/additional_data construction for records carrying a CID
results.change_action: used as tls12_cid in the constructed input
results.input_evidence: seq_num_placeholder + tls12_cid + cid_length + tls12_cid + DTLSCiphertext.version + epoch + sequence_number + cid + length_of_DTLSInnerPlaintext;
results.comment: RFC 9146 MAC/AAD 构造以 tls12_cid、cid_length、CID 和内部长度作为输入。BoringSSL AEAD Open/SealScatter 只使用 record.header 作为 AAD，没有 CID AAD 构造。
results.comparison_summary: 要求 -> CID 记录使用 modified MAC/AAD；标准含义 -> tls12_cid 在 AAD 中出现并隔离非 CID MAC 输入；代码行为 -> additional data 是解析/写出的 record.header；结论 -> 不满足。

results.change_condition: for a DTLSCiphertext record carrying a CID
results.input_evidence: outer_type:  The outer content type of a DTLSCiphertext record carrying a CID is always set to tls12_cid(25).
results.comment: RFC 9146 要求携带 CID 的 DTLSCiphertext.outer_type 固定为 tls12_cid(25)。BoringSSL 无 tls12_cid 常量，DTLS 1.2 写路径直接使用调用方 type。
results.comparison_summary: 要求 -> CID record outer_type 为 25；标准含义 -> 真实类型移入 DTLSInnerPlaintext.real_type；代码行为 -> out[0]=type；结论 -> 不满足。

results.change_condition: for MAC/additional_data construction
results.input_evidence: seq_num_placeholder:  8 bytes of 0xff.
results.comment: RFC 9146 modified MAC/AAD 使用 8 字节 0xff seq_num_placeholder。BoringSSL 没有该字段或等价构造。
results.comparison_summary: 要求 -> MAC/AAD 前缀包含 8 bytes 0xff；标准含义 -> 将 CID 与非 CID MAC 输入分离；代码行为 -> 使用 DTLSRecordNumber combined/sequence 和 record.header；结论 -> 不满足。

results.change_condition: when determining whether a received datagram can trigger a peer address change
results.change_action: must be newer than the newest datagram received
results.old_value: sequence number of the newest datagram received
results.new_value: a greater/newer sequence number in the received datagram
results.input_evidence: The received datagram is "newer" (in terms of both epoch and sequence number) than the newest datagram received.
results.comment: 与 epoch 条件相同，BoringSSL 记录层跟踪 sequence replay，但没有 CID peer address update 逻辑，因此不存在用于地址更新的 newest datagram sequence 检查。
results.comparison_summary: 要求 -> 地址更新只能由更新的 epoch/sequence 触发；标准含义 -> 防止乱序或重放回滚地址；代码行为 -> replay bitmap 只决定记录接受/丢弃；结论 -> 不满足。

results.change_condition: for applicability of this content type
results.change_action: must be present only for DTLS 1.2
results.input_evidence: The tls12_cid content type is only applicable to DTLS 1.2.
results.comment: RFC 9146 分配 tls12_cid(25)，且仅适用于 DTLS 1.2。BoringSSL 没有 tls12_cid content type；DTLS 1.3 的 CID bit 反而被显式拒绝。
results.standard_section: Section 10.3 New Entry in TLS ContentType Registry
results.comparison_summary: 要求 -> tls12_cid(25) 仅用于 DTLS 1.2；标准含义 -> 不能误用于 TLS 或 DTLS 1.3；代码行为 -> 无 tls12_cid，DTLS 1.3 CID bit return false；结论 -> 不满足该内容类型支持。

results.change_condition: when registered in the "TLS ContentType" registry
results.input_evidence: IANA has allocated tls12_cid(25) in the "TLS ContentType" registry.
results.comment: tls12_cid(25) 的 IANA 分配本身不是代码实现项；实际 content type 支持缺失已在适用性条目中记录。
results.standard_section: Section 10.3 New Entry in TLS ContentType Registry
results.comparison_summary: 要求 -> IANA 分配 codepoint 25；标准含义 -> 注册表元数据；代码行为 -> 无 tls12_cid 常量；结论 -> 注册表动作不适用。

results.change_condition: when the record does not carry a CID
results.change_action: must not be tls12_cid; records with other content types are excluded from the modified algorithm
results.input_evidence: The modified algorithm MUST NOT be applied to records that do not carry a CID, i.e., records with content type other than tls12_cid.
results.comment: BoringSSL 没有实现 modified CID MAC/AAD，因此普通非 CID 记录不会错误应用该算法；DTLS 1.2 普通记录仍走 RFC 6347 header/AAD。
results.comparison_summary: 要求 -> 非 tls12_cid 记录不得使用 modified algorithm；标准含义 -> CID 算法只作用于 CID records；代码行为 -> no-CID 记录使用 record.header；结论 -> 对无 CID 记录满足。

results.change_condition: may appear after the type field in cleartext
results.change_action: set to an arbitrary-length run of zero-valued bytes
results.input_evidence: zeros:  An arbitrary-length run of zero-valued bytes may appear in the cleartext after the type field.
results.comment: BoringSSL DTLS 1.3 路径支持 encrypted inner type 后的零填充剥离，但 RFC 9146 要求的是 DTLS 1.2 CID 的 DTLSInnerPlaintext padding；该路径不存在。
results.comparison_summary: 要求 -> DTLSInnerPlaintext.real_type 后可有 zero-valued padding；标准含义 -> CID 记录内部明文可填充；代码行为 -> 仅 DTLS 1.3 has_padding 路径处理 trailing zeros；结论 -> 部分满足。
results.category: DTLS 1.3 padding only, no RFC 9146 DTLS 1.2 CID padding

results.change_condition: used as DTLSInnerPlaintext padding
results.input_evidence: An arbitrary-length run of zero-valued bytes may appear in the cleartext after the type field.
results.comment: 零填充值要求在 BoringSSL 的 DTLS 1.3 trailing zero 逻辑中体现，但没有 RFC 9146 DTLS 1.2 CID DTLSInnerPlaintext 构造，因此只部分满足。
results.comparison_summary: 要求 -> padding bytes must be 0x00；标准含义 -> real_type 后只能是零值填充；代码行为 -> DTLS 1.3 while(record.type==0) 剥离零；结论 -> 部分满足。
results.category: DTLS 1.3 padding only, no RFC 9146 DTLS 1.2 CID padding
